title: Meccion PZ2 Impact Driver Bits 50mm Length 10Pcs Professional Pozidriv Magnetic Screwdriver Bits Set - 1/4 Inch Hex Shank
features: Premium Screwdriver Bits - Made of engineered steel with forged and heat treated for greater impact resistance and a longer service life.
Durable - Industrial grade S2 alloy steel bits with hardened to provide improved durability and reduced breakage, black oxide finish for corrosion resistance.
Smoothly - Precision milled profile and optimized tip for optimum fit results and avoid skidding during screwing，Ideal for continuous high torque use.
Compatible - Standard 1/4 inch hex shank compatible with most drills, electric screwdrivers, ratchet wrench.
HOW WE’RE DIFFERENT - We aim to make the best products to live a more convenient and secure lifestyle. We have a professional products monitoring team focusing on all the details.
description: MECCION continues to design and optimize professional jobsite solutions - tools, accessories and service - to ensure absolute confidence for the toughest conditions.
